_comment: Per-source actor rewrites applied BEFORE cross-document merging. Keys are source_document values exactly as they appear in 5_nodes.json (e.g. 'japan25.pdf' or 'https://www.example.com/page'). Each rule has 'match' (case-insensitive regex on the full entity name) and either 'replace' (new name, supports $1/$2 capture groups), 'drop' (remove the actor + its edges), or 'drop_if_unmapped' (remove only if no per-source rule already renamed it). Wildcards: keys under '*' apply to every source. Matching order: per-source rules first (can rename, chain continues), then '*' rules.

*.match: ^microsoft (365|advertising|azure|bing|build|clarity|copilot|designer|developer|developer network|developer network \(msdn\)|edge|entra id|fabric|family safety|foundry|graph|ireland|ireland operations|learn|loop|m12|marketplace|office|office 365|office mobile|onedrive|onenote|outlook|places|power apps|power automate|power bi|power platform|powerpoint|sharepoint|start|store|teams|to do|viva|word|windows|excel|affiliates)$

^fujitsu (limited|group|japan limited|corp\.?|corporation|laboratories|research|distinguished engineers|sports|accelerator|blog|cross culture center|technology park|uvance|uvance kawasaki tower|ventures)$
^amazon (web services|web services, inc\.?|web services \(aws\)|web services emea sarl|web services \(aws\) marketplace solutions)$

^ibm (corp\.?|corporation|inc\.?|corporation \(ibm\)|business partners|champions|developer|cloud catalog|cloud support team|cio office|center for cloud training|cloud center for training enterprise subscription administrators|community advocacy|consulting|deutschland|education|fix central|granite\.code|instana observability path|japan,?|learning individual subscription with coursera|partner|partner ecosystem|partner plus|partner plus program|partner portal|partner program|partnerplus|passport advantage|redbooks|skills network|support|support portal|sustainability software|techxchange community|techxchange event attendees|techxchange rewards program - formerly known as ibm learn 'n score program|technology|training|tutorials|user groups|verify|webinar series|bob)$

^intel (corporation|inc\.?|capital|foundation|ignite|labs|geti|automotive|data center group|inside®|news room|pride|vitality|core™|core™ ultra|developer catalog|nuc|partner alliance|partner showcase|server m50fcp family|trust authority|xeon®|® core™|® core™ ultra|® developer catalog|® nuc|® partner alliance|® partner showcase|® server m50fcp family|® trust authority|® xeon®)$
